overview: I built four application modules for the Buying Group Personalization Advisor: Reference Mode, Advisory Mode, Guided Workflow Mode, and a Website Experience Simulator. Key lessons came from empirical RAG threshold tuning (0.75→0.

keyPoints.title: Similarity threshold dropped from 0.75 to 0.38 empirically
Two retrieval indexes required: vector prose, structured tabular
FLAG/HOLD interrupt system enforces two distinct step-blocking states
UX critique surfaced 4 findings: jargon, grouping, missing orientation layer
Decisioning trace panel shows every rule firing per visitor state
